notes: Two systematic error patterns across all responses: (1) the per-history-item cost is $0.00 but Q3VL-8B-Q8 reads it as $9.00 in all 5 reps while Q3.5-4B reads $8.00 in reps 2-4 (only Q3.5-4B rep0 gets it right) — these are OCR misreads, not hallucinations; (2) the 'Generate Image' button is faded/disabled, yet 8 of 10 responses call it enabled/blue — only Q3.5-4B reps 1, 2, and 4 correctly identify it as disabled. Q3VL-8B-Q8 produces remarkably consistent, complete, well-structured transcriptions but uniformly misses the cost digit and button state; Q3.5-4B is more variable, with two reps (3 and 4) truncated and rep1 also truncated mid-response. No response fabricated clearly-absent content; the minor icon embellishments (lock/refresh/progress-bar) in Q3.5-4B reps are unverified-but-plausible UI elements and were not flagged as hallucinations per the dense-scene confidence rule.
